opportunities.title: Dispute the duplicate CPT 71046 charge
opportunities.description: The bill lists CPT 71046 (Chest X-ray) twice on 03/14/2026, but the EOB explicitly flags the second instance as a duplicate. The provider must reverse this $468 line.

opportunities.title: Reverse the balance-billing overage
opportunities.description: EOB caps your responsibility at $2,759.50. The bill's $6,371.50 balance bills you $3,612 above that — prohibited under the No Surprises Act for an in-network provider. Demand the bill be corrected to the EOB amount.

opportunities.title: Negotiate remaining balance for prompt-pay
opportunities.description: After the disputed $3,612 is removed, the legitimate $2,759.50 balance is often eligible for a 10-20% prompt-pay discount if you offer to settle in full within 30 days.

opportunities.title: Apply for charity-care / financial hardship
opportunities.description: Most non-profit hospitals have a financial assistance program (FAP) that further reduces the patient's out-of-pocket. Ask St. Synthetic Regional for their FAP application — it can stack with the corrections above.
